## Test plan

<!-- Check what applies. CI must pass before merge. -->

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] Changes stay inside the narrowest owning surface (core / cli / adapters)
- [ ] Docs updated when CLI, registry, or session shapes change (`docs/cli-reference.md`, schemas, affected README/examples/adapter docs)
- [ ] No unimplemented behavior is documented (implemented behavior only)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
